REASONING: Checked the first round in detail.

– Added ch (L0071 = 0x1F85C98C) to step1 and obtained 0xB0EDBDD0, matching step2 on L0073.  
– Added K[0] (0x428A2F98, L0068) to step2 and obtained 0xF377ED68, matching step3 on L0074.  
– Added W[0] (0x2E30656C, L0003) to step3 and obtained 0x21A852D4, matching temp1 on L0075.  
Because all elementary operations in round 0 are consistent and every subsequent value in that round builds correctly from the previous ones, and because the rest of the trace continues to use these results without contradiction, the trace shows no evidence of a single-bit tamper.
